purpose: Declares the domains that exist in this project, their boundaries, and what they explicitly are not. Source of truth for 'which folder does this code belong to?'

rules.forbidden_name_notes: These names are not banned outright. They require an explicit domain entry in this contract with a real purpose, boundary, and charter. A generic container with no charter is a violation.

on_new_module: Identify its owning domain from this contract before writing code
If no domain fits, stop and propose a new domain entry plus a charter
Do not place the module in a generic container
on_domain_overlap: Record the overlap in .law/context/current-system.json under contradiction_map
